{"currentConversationId":"__NEW_AGENT__","agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"b9e7dbc0-5a9f-42d0-8fe9-f5ba612d03f2":{"id":"b9e7dbc0-5a9f-42d0-8fe9-f5ba612d03f2","name":"JSON example for CreateProfessionalUseCase Input
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-26T22:40:31.972Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-26T22:40:47.354Z","chatHistory":[{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a22afa81-109c-4fb4-a20c-9da0696491f9","timestamp":"2025-10-26T22:40:37.966Z","request_message":"create a json data class Input(
 val name: String,
 val email: String? = null,
 val phone: Phone? = null,
 val password: String? = null,
 val establishmentId: Long? = null,
 val bio: String? = null,
 val instagram: String? = null,
 val facebook: String? = null,
 val photo: String? = null,
 val workHours: List<Interval>? = null
 )","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"02d8dc33-2ca9-4fc9-aaa5-6fd3b4beb70b","timestamp":"2025-10-26T22:40:47.354Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-7dcfc1ac-a3f1-4c9e-8931-24ba8fcb711a":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-1655f123-cb6c-47fe-b2a5-6f6088eb576c":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""}},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":true,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false,"hasTitleGenerated":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"4bce157f-6ffe-4b6b-8017-04b4cccb4a66"},"83ed3644-ad88-4de2-8203-17bf0da60a04":{"id":"83ed3644-ad88-4de2-8203-17bf0da60a04","createdAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:18:35.936Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:18:35.936Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"mentioned_items":[],"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0},"7a23eaee-020a-4a6c-8d46-4651c780d887":{"id":"7a23eaee-020a-4a6c-8d46-4651c780d887","name":"Fixed Jackson LocalDateTime serialization error
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:18:36.019Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:21:06.022Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"3004a834-db2c-48c3-aef0-bc2329fd808f","uuid":"bca73572-570d-4c59-afaa-d1d2c02e0429","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1761614316020,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"03c1d9c3-7204-43f0-a4aa-3b4e87963dab","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:38.035Z","request_message":"io.ktor.serialization.JsonConvertException: Illegal json parameter found: Java 8 date/time type `java.time.LocalDateTime` not supported by default: add Module "com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype:jackson-datatype-jsr310" to enable handling (or disable `MapperFeature.REQUIRE_HANDLERS_FOR_JAVA8_TIMES`)","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"57b81d58-d7bf-4b0e-bd80-e5d1967a7c69","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:49.762Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f07bd728-d2db-4ac6-bd00-aa596512b624","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:56.120Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"e5e3505e-ef17-42e0-9c0b-767e2bc327b9","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:06.704Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3a44acf8-b49d-4d58-bab2-cf8ef2cadf43","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:13.688Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"56b9793f-8554-4019-a82a-5403503f38d3","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:17.909Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"415083b1-cbe6-485e-b69f-0bc01f42152d","uuid":"ff9eab88-f410-4a9e-bbfb-b8e9397b3871","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1761614316020,"toTimestamp":1761614369064,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"8f88ad24-c8ab-47c9-808c-5111f283a50f","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:20:42.619Z","request_message":"use
